headline: Marathon Petroleum Corp (NYSE:MPC) Screens as a High-Growth Momentum Play with Explosive Earnings and a Clean Breakout Setup
summary: Marathon Petroleum (MPC) shows explosive 787.5% EPS growth and strong analyst revisions with a high HGM rating of 6. Its technical setup (TA 8, Setup 8) signals a potential breakout near $267.23, making it a top high-growth momentum stock.
